# CWE-260 — Password in Configuration File (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-260-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gopkg.in/yaml.v3"
)

type dbConfig struct {
	Host     string `yaml:"host"`
	Password string `yaml:"password"`
}

// Vulnerable: loads database password from a world-readable config file on disk.
func LoadDBConfig(c *gin.Context) {
	data, err := os.ReadFile("/etc/slopguard/config.yaml")
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(500, gin.H{"error": "config"})
		return
	}
	var cfg dbConfig
	if yaml.Unmarshal(data, &cfg) != nil {
		c.JSON(500, gin.H{"error": "parse"})
		return
	}
	c.Set("db_password", cfg.Password)
}
